# Standard Delivery

Standard shipment is free on orders over fifty dollars and takes three to five business days in under the continental United States. Orders below the free-shipping threshold pay a flat four-dollar fee. Standard shipment does not include weekend handling, so an order placed on Friday afternoon begins processing the following Monday.

[Source: shipping_options.md#standard-delivery]
